overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Star Wars game showing a Jedi character exploring a space station platform with a planet and asteroid field in the background. The character walks along a curved metallic pathway past futuristic structures while a bright sun illuminates the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: space station observation deck with planetary view

agents.ego_description: standing and slowly walking while observing the asteroid field and planetary rings

entered.detail: large planet with prominent vertical ring system dominating the background
spherical celestial body with craters floating in space
bright orange energy trail streaking across the sky
scattered rocks and debris floating in zero gravity
large island-like rock formation suspended in space with flat top

segments.scene_description: The character stands on a space platform overlooking a vast cosmic vista. A massive ringed planet dominates the center background while asteroids float nearby. The character moves slowly, taking in the view of the glowing comet trail and floating rock formations.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved walkway with railing overlooking space

events.description: bright sun comes into view creating lens flare and strong backlighting

agents.ego_description: walking along the curved platform toward the sun, passing a tall spire structure

entered.detail: intense white light source creating lens flare and casting long shadows
thin dark vertical tower rising from the platform edge
massive dark spacecraft or station component passing overhead

segments.scene_description: The character walks forward along the curved platform as the bright sun emerges from behind structures, creating a dramatic lens flare. The character passes a tall spire and moves under a large dark hull structure while the planet shifts to the left of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: space station upper level with domed buildings

events.description: approaching the main station complex with white industrial buildings

agents.ego_description: continuing along the walkway passing a circular guard tower and approaching white station buildings

entered.detail: rounded cylindrical structure with metallic dome roof
long industrial structure with yellow horizontal stripes and antenna arrays

segments.scene_description: The character walks past a circular guard tower toward the main station complex. White industrial buildings with yellow markings come into view as the sun moves to the center of the sky. The comet trail reappears on the right side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: overlook platform with view of lower station levels

events.description: character slows and stops at railing to look down at lower station levels

agents.ego_description: stopping at the railing to overlook the lower station structures and industrial complex below

entered.detail: multi-level industrial structures visible below the platform edge
complex machinery and tower structures on lower levels of the station
safety railing at the platform edge overlooking the drop

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the edge of the platform and stops at a metal railing to observe the lower levels of the station. Complex industrial structures and towers are visible below, while the white station building now appears on the left. The character stands still, taking in the view of the multi-level complex.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement across a futuristic space platform that transitions from a wide cosmic vista to a detailed view of an industrial station complex. It begins with the character overlooking a massive ringed planet and floating asteroids, moving slowly as a glowing comet trail streaks across the sky. As the character walks forward along the curved platform, a bright sun emerges from behind a tall spire to create a dramatic lens flare, shifting the planet to the left while the camera passes under a large dark hull. The scene then opens up toward the main station complex, passing a circular guard tower and white industrial buildings with yellow markings as the sun moves to the center of the sky. Finally, the camera approaches a metal railing where the character stops to observe the intricate lower levels of the multi-level station complex.
